title: Bailing Out the Banks: The Hidden Significance of Beijing Property Support Measures
dek: Assessing how property-support measures influence banking-system risk transfer and credit-cycle dynamics.
keyFindings: Policy support can stabilize liquidity while delaying full balance-sheet recognition.
Banking-system risk transfer mechanics matter for private-credit entry points.
Asset-resolution pathways remain central to medium-term recovery values.

paragraphs: This issue is presented in ShoreVest’s unified print format for consistency across the China Debt Dynamics archive.

disclaimer: This letter expresses the views of the author as of the date indicated and such views are subject to change without notice.
